title: Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps: Which One Actually Gets You Funded in 2026?
description: Everyone's fighting over Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps. But funded traders know the truth. R2F Trading breaks down which ICT concept actually wins — and which one gets beginners wiped out. Watch before your next trade. r2ftrading.com
script: Order blocks or fair value gaps. Traders are picking sides. One of them is costing you funded accounts. Order blocks. Strong institutional zones. Price respects them — sometimes. But beginners mark every candle and get wrecked. Fair value gaps. Imbalances price HAS to revisit. Fast entries, tight stops. Sounds perfect. But 73% of FVGs fail without confluence. So which one wins? Neither — alone. That's the trap most traders fall into. The R2F Trading system stacks them. Order block sets the zone. FVG inside it gives the precision entry. That's the edge. Funded traders aren't choosing one. They're combining both. Stop picking sides. Start stacking confluence. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
